rationale: Add flexibility to extra_context, yes/no strings, list literals, successful hooks, and richer nested template entries.

updates.replacement:
extra_context_object
    : '{}'
    | '{' extra_context_pair (',' extra_context_pair)* '}'
    ;

extra_context_pair
    : STRING ':' extra_context_value
    ;

extra_context_value
    : STRING               // generic string value
    | json_bool            // true/false
    | list_literal         // list of strings
    | object_literal       // nested object
    ;

list_literal
    : '[' STRING (',' STRING)* ']'
    ;

object_literal
    : '{' extra_context_pair (',' extra_context_pair)* '}'
    ;

nested_templates_value
    : 'null'
    | '[' nested_template_entry (',' nested_template_entry)* ']'
    ;

nested_template_entry
    : '{'
      '"key"' ':' nested_key ','
      '"path"' ':' nested_path ','
      '"title"' ':' nested_title ','
      '"description"' ':' nested_description
      '}'
    ;

nested_key
    : STRING // allow any string, not just fixed literals
    ;

nested_path
    : STRING // allow any string
    ;

nested_title
    : STRING // allow any string
    ;

nested_description
    : STRING // allow any string
    ;
